title: asterocephalus mollis
intro: Asterocephalus mollis, commonly known as soft starflower, is a plant species within the family Campanulaceae. The soft starflower has been utilized for its medicinal properties, which include its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Soft starflower can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, making it a versatile natural remedy for various health concerns.
